name: Application Intake & Completeness Check
description: As a CAA case officer I want to receive a complete Operational Authorisation pack so that I can open a valid case.

name: SORA 2.0 Assessment for Swarm
description: As a CAA SORA assessor I want swarm-aware SORA evidence so that I can set SAIL and OSO requirements defensibly.

name: ConOps & ODD Review
description: As a CAA safety-case reviewer I want a clear ConOps and ODD so that I can judge nominal and worst-credible behaviour.

name: Airspace Change & TDA Coordination
description: As a CAA airspace regulator I want a TDA and consultation package so that I can segregate the trial from other users.

name: Geofence / Containment Enforcement
description: As a CAA airspace regulator I want automatic containment so that a fly-away cannot become uncontrolled BVLOS.

name: C2 Link and Spectrum Assurance
description: As a CAA spectrum specialist I want authorised monitored C2 and inter-vehicle links so that link loss is survivable and non-interfering.

name: Detect-and-Avoid Performance
description: As a CAA DAA assessor I want DO-365 / F3442-aligned evidence for each aircraft and coordinated swarm de-confliction so that cooperative and non-cooperative encounters are resolved predictably.

name: Swarm Decision-Making Architecture Review
description: As a CAA autonomy reviewer I want the decision-making architecture airborne limits and emergent-behaviour evidence so that I can assure what the swarm will do collectively.

name: ML Assurance Case
description: As a CAA AI/ML assurance specialist I want an AMLAS / SACE case a frozen-model manifest and explainability evidence so that ML components are assurable and forensically explainable.

name: Human Oversight and Crew Fitness
description: As a CAA human factors inspector I want workload duty and take-over evidence so that meaningful human control is demonstrated throughout.

name: Contingency and Flight Termination
description: As a CAA flight-ops inspector I want independent termination a contingency matrix and ATSU coordination so that the trial can be made safe in any off-nominal state.

name: Data MOR & DPIA Obligations
description: As a CAA flight safety investigator I want complete recorded evidence accepted MOR obligations and a DPIA so that any incident is investigable and privacy is protected.

name: Insurance & Ground-Environment Survey
description: As a CAA authorisation officer I want insurance and a ground survey so that third-party risk is both transferable and factually grounded.

name: Crew Training & Competency
description: As a CAA licensing inspector I want evidenced competency so that the trial is flown by qualified crew.

name: CAA/MAA Interface Management
description: As a CAA/MAA liaison I want a signed apportionment so that regulatory ownership is gap-free.

name: Phased Trial Build-Up
description: As a CAA programme manager I want phased gates so that evidence builds progressively and is reversible.

name: Public and Stakeholder Engagement
description: No user story covers community consultation press/media handling or prior-notification to landowners. Strongly implied by CAP 1616 and GDPR but absent.

name: Security Classification Handling
description: No user story addresses how classified MOD evidence is presented to the CAA under CAP 722H / JSP 440 without compromise to either side.

name: Environmental Impact
description: No user story covers noise species disturbance at dusk/night or battery-fire environmental risk on ground.

name: Post-Trial Assurance & Close-out
description: No user story covers the post-trial lessons-learned evidence preservation and authorisation close-out.
